summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Calendar integration features for GradNext. All 7 requested features are working correctly: Calendar status returns available, booking creates calendar events with Google Meet links, bookings include meet_link and calendar_invite_sent fields, Join buttons appear on Coaching and Peer Practice pages for sessions with meet_link, and Workshop Join button uses meeting_link from workshop data.

minor.issue: Time slot format mismatch - peer availability uses 'Mon 10:00' format but calendar service expects 'HH:MM' format. Booking works when using correct format.

critical_code_review_comments: Calendar integration is well implemented with proper error handling and fallbacks
Join buttons correctly check for meet_link before rendering
data-testid attributes are properly set for testing (join-booking-{id}, join-peer-session-{id})
updated_files: /app/tests/test_calendar_integration.py - Created comprehensive test suite for calendar integration features

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed, 1 skipped due to slot already booked)

seed_data_creation: Multiple coaching and peer practice sessions created during testing with Google Meet links
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Calendar integration is fully functional. Calendar events are created with Google Meet links when booking coaching sessions or peer practice sessions. The meet_link is stored in bookings/peer_sessions collections and returned via API. Join buttons appear on Coaching and Peer Practice pages for sessions with meet_link. Workshop Join button uses meeting_link field from workshop data.

calendar_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/calendar/status returns calendar_available: true, impersonating: info@gradnext.co, timezone: Asia/Kolkata

coaching_booking_with_calendar.details: POST /api/mentors/{id}/book creates calendar event with Google Meet link. Response includes meet_link and calendar_invite_sent: true

booking_response_fields.details: Booking response includes meet_link (e.g., https://meet.google.com/xxx-xxxx-xxx) and calendar_invite_sent: true

user_bookings_with_meet_link.details: GET /api/mentors/bookings/my returns bookings with meet_link field populated

coaching_page_join_button.details: Join button appears on Coaching page for bookings with meet_link. Found 5 Join buttons with data-testid='join-booking-{id}'

peer_practice_join_button.details: Join button appears on Peer Practice page for sessions with meet_link. Found 3 Join buttons with data-testid='join-peer-session-{id}'

workshop_join_button.details: Workshop Join button uses meeting_link from workshop data. handleJoinWorkshop function opens meeting_link in new tab if available

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
